race.comment: GENRICHERO (6) settled well back last time out then found the line strongly to finish 9 lengths away in fifth over 2100m at Sandown. Look for another barnstorming finish. OMAMORI (8) has been building all campaign and only just missed last time at Moe. That was over 2400m, which will have brought him on for this. CUSTOMER SERVICE (3) improved last time out, finishing 4 lengths from the winner in third when he made late ground at the end of 2000m at Mornington. Ideally placed and is sure to be there at the finish. FERAGO (1) is back from a couple of jumps runs and still more than capable on the flat in this company.
